items.title: VI Live: Liverpool treedt met vier Nederlanders aan op Dean Court
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er weer veel fraaie potjes in binnen- en buitenland op het programma. NEC krijgt bezoek van PEC Zwolle, FC Twente speelt tegen Excelsior en in het buitenland komen onder meer Liverpool, Manchester City, Bayern München en Real Madrid in actie. Volg het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: Live updates: Man City beat Wolves; Wrexham win after last-gasp goals
items.summary: Manchester City made light work of Wolves in the Premier League, but it was Wrexham that stole the spotlight.

items.title: City wint in spaarstand, twijfelachtige hoofdrol Van de Ven en Verbruggen
items.summary: Manchester City heeft zich met een overwinning op Wolverhampton Wanderers hersteld van de nederlaag in de Champions League. Fulham won zaterdagmiddag ook in de Premier League, met een ongelukkige rol voor Brighton & Hove Albion-keeper Bart Verbruggen. Tottenham Hotspur pakte een punt bij Burnley.

items.title: Berman: Rodman deal shows new rule is working
items.summary: NWSL commissioner Jessica Berman cited Trinity Rodman's new deal as evidence that the league's new High Impact Player is working as intended: to retain and attract top players.

items.title: Infantino: Resale will drive up WC ticket prices
items.summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said that many fans who have applied for tickets for the 2026 World Cup will be looking to sell them for profit on resale sites, thus driving up the cost of ticket prices.

items.title: Wrexham strike twice in injury time to stun QPR
items.summary: Wrexham struck twice in injury time to beat QPR and secure all three points in a dramatic Championship affair.

items.title: Romero hits late equaliser to spare Tottenham
items.summary: Lyle Foster scored a late winner for Burnley as they kept their Premier League survival hopes alive with a 2-1 win over Tottenham.

items.title: Burnley 2-2 Tottenham, Man City 2-0 Wolves, Fulham 2-1 Brighton: clockwatch – live
items.summary: Join us for updates from the 3pm kick-offs Share your thoughts with Rob via email Kevin and Alex Iwobi come into the Fulham XI. Brighton bring in Olivier Boscagli, Carlos Baleba and Yasin Ayari. It’s not clear who will start at right-back for them, possibly Pascal Gross. Fulham (4-2-3-1) Leno; Castagne, Andersen, Cuenca, Robinson; Iwobi, Berge; Wilson, Smith Rowe, Kevin; Jimenez. Continue reading...

items.title: European football: Augsburg stun Bayern Munich as comeback ends unbeaten run
items.summary: Massengo and Chaves strike late in Bavarian derby Defeat ends Bayern’s 27-game unbeaten league run Strugglers Augsburg scored twice in six minutes late in the second half to come from a goal down and stun hosts Bayern Munich 2-1 in the Bavarian derby on Saturday, the league leaders’ first Bundesliga loss of the season. The hosts, fresh from securing a Champions League knockout spot with Wednesday’s 2-0 win over Union Saint-Gilloise, took a 23rd-minute lead thanks to Hiroki Ito’s header but lacked any spark upfront as Augsburg struck in the 75th and 81st minutes through Arthur Chaves and Han-Noah Massengo to earn their first win in Munich for 11 years. This story will be updated Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: voormalig PSV'er Gomes brengt bezoek aan Eindhoven
items.summary: PSV staat zaterdagavond om 20.00 uur in het Philips Stadion tegenover NAC Breda. De ploeg van Peter Bosz won dertien Eredivisie-duels op rij en hoopt de veertiende aan die zegereeks toe te voegen. Volg de wedstrijd op de voet in deze VI Live.

items.title: Bournemouth v Liverpool: Premier League – live
items.summary: Match at Vitality Stadium kicks off at 5.30pm (GMT) Live scores | Share your thoughts with Billy via email There’s been plenty of late drama in the Premier League so far today. These are all full-time results: West Ham 3-1 Sunderland Burnley 2-2 Tottenham Fulham 2-1 Brighton Manchester City 2-0 Wolves Continue reading...

items.title: PSV meldt zich voor 19-jarige Alphadjo Cissè
items.summary: PSV is bezig met de komst van Alphadjo Cissè, een aanvallende middenvelder van Hellas Verona die op huurbasis in de Serie B actief is, bij Catanzaro. Berichten daarover in Italiaanse media worden aan VI bevestigd.

items.title: Man City beat Wolves to end winless run as Haaland is benched
items.summary: Manchester City dropped Erling Haaland and ended their four-game winless streak in the Premier League with a 2-0 victory over Wolves at the Etihad Stadium.

items.title: Afrika Cup-smaakmaker helpt Ajax-opponent Olympiakos aan zuinige zege
items.summary: Ayoub El Kaabi heeft Olympiakos Piraeus zaterdag naar een kleine overwinning op Volos geleid. De Marokkaanse spits begon voor het eerst sinds zijn terugkeer van de Afrika Cup in de basis en was meteen beslissend voor de komende tegenstander van Ajax in de Champions League.

items.title: 'Beth Mead loves big games' - pundits on player of the match
items.summary: BBC Sport pundits Fara Williams and Ellen White discuss Beth Mead's "technically gifted" performance and how she "steps up in big moments" as Arsenal beat Chelsea in the Women's Super League.

items.title: 'The title race is probably over' - Bompastor on Chelsea defeat
items.summary: Chelsea manager Sonia Bompastor says she knows the "title race is gone" but her side "will never give up" following defeat by Arsenal at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Sir Gino injury mars The New Lion's Unibet Hurdle win at Cheltenham
items.summary: Dan Skelton's The New Lion won the Unibet Hurdle at Cheltenham but the race was marred by an injury to Sir Gino.

items.title: Root stars in rare England ODI win to set up series decider in Sri Lanka
items.summary: England put a halt to their torrid one-day international record as they claimed a five-wicket win over Sri Lanka to take their three-match ODI series to a decider in Colombo.

items.title: Mead and Caldentey star as Arsenal triumph over Chelsea
items.summary: Beth Mead puts Arsenal in front in the 55th minute before Mariona Caldentey completes a 2-0 victory for the Gunners at Stamford Bridge.

items.title: Spillane's Tower bounces back for Cotswold Chase triumph
items.summary: Spillane's Tower roared back to his very best to take victory in the Betfair Cotswold Chase on Trials day at Cheltenham.
